MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Benjamin Holl, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Vyaky Gamble, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Jon Berkley Management, Inc.
Paul Arshawsky representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Felice Ellis is present.
Susan Petro representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date of September 27, 2007 is off calendar.
